posts.cookedHtml:

image928×261 27.1 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! This is expected behavior, as the Location column is not supported in the Conditional Coloring feature.

Our apologies for the inconvenience here!

posts.author: cdeberry (Cheryl DeBerry)
posts.cookedHtml: @CharlotteK do you know where the colors for the map pins comes from? I can’t figure it out.
